debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
as bs cs : List α
⊢ @appendLists α (@appendLists α as bs) cs = @appendLists α as (@appendLists α bs cs)

proof:
have h : (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    induction as with
    | nil => simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.cons_append]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.append_assoc])
  exact h

induction as with
  | nil =>
    ; simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    cases bs with
    | nil =>
      simp [appendLists] at *
      <;> simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try aesop
    | cons b bs =>
      simp [appendLists] at *
      <;> simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try aesop

have h₂ : (2 : ℕ) ≠ 1 := by decide
  have h₃ : 2 ∈ ({1, 2, 3} : Finset ℕ) := by decide
  have h₄ : (2 : ℕ) ≠ 1 → False := h 2 h₃
  have h₅ : False := h₄ h₂
  exact h₅
successful_attempts:
have h : (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    induction as with
    | nil => simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>

induction as with

  | cons a as ih =>

    <;>

    <;>

have h_main : ∀ (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro as
    induction as with
    | nil =>
      intro bs cs
      simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      intro bs cs
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
  apply h_main

have h_base : ([] : List α) +' bs = bs := by
    simp [appendLists]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  have h_inductive_step : ∀ (a : α) (as : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) → ((a :: as) +' bs) +' cs = (a :: as) +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro a as h
    have h₁ : ((a :: as) +' bs) +' cs = (a :: (as +' bs)) +' cs := by
      simp [appendLists]
      <;>
      aesop
    have h₂ : (a :: (as +' bs)) +' cs = a :: ((as +' bs) +' cs) := by
      simp [appendLists]
      <;>
      aesop
    have h₃ : (a :: as) +' (bs +' cs) = a :: (as +' (bs +' cs)) := by
      simp [appendLists]
      <;>
      aesop
    calc
      ((a :: as) +' bs) +' cs = (a :: (as +' bs)) +' cs := by rw [h₁]
      _ = a :: ((as +' bs) +' cs) := by rw [h₂]
      _ = a :: (as +' (bs +' cs)) := by rw [h]
      _ = (a :: as) +' (bs +' cs) := by rw [h₃]
  
  have h_main : (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    have h₁ : ∀ (as : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
      intro as
      induction as with
      | nil =>
        simp [appendLists] at *
        <;>
        aesop
      | cons a as ih =>
        apply h_inductive_step a as ih
    apply h₁
  
  apply h_main

have h_main : ∀ (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro as
    induction as with
    | nil => 
      intro bs cs
      simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      intro bs cs
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try apply List.cons_congr) <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try apply ih) <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists])
  
  have h_final : (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := h_main as bs cs
  exact h_final

have h : ∀ (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro as
    induction as with
    | nil =>
      intro bs cs
      simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      intro bs cs
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [appendLists]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
  exact h as bs cs
